title: Billing Testing Coverage (e2e + manual smoke)
coverageTarget: 100% functional + 100% line on apps/api billing services/routes/webhooks and packages/billing — with documented true-impossible-in-e2e exceptions in T-143-55.

phases.phase-0: Infrastructure (foundational, blocks everything) — includes deletion of deprecated 2025-11 tests
phases.phase-1-A: Critical e2e flows (15 financial flows including free signup, API idempotency, webhook concurrency)
phases.phase-1-C: Prod manual smoke — 3 most critical flows (go-live gate)
phases.phase-2-A: High-priority e2e flows (trials, cancel/pause/resume, dunning, refund/dispute, D4 authorized, MP error handling, grace/plan-lifecycle)
phases.phase-3-A: Important e2e flows (promo, sponsorship, overrides, cache, admin ops, exchange rate, D1..D8, plan migration matrix, multi-currency)
phases.phase-3-BD: Staging smoke for Phase 3 + Sentry filter tuning
phases.phase-4: Observability + runbooks + dashboards + docs + CI tuning + 100% coverage report with exception list

tasks.title: Fix apps/api/.env.test credentials + reconcile DB URL source of truth
tasks.notes: Two issues: (1) .env.test uses hospeda:hospeda but docker postgres has hospeda_user:hospeda_pass; (2) setup/test-database.ts reads TEST_DB_URL/USER/PASSWORD/etc instead of HOSPEDA_DATABASE_URL, creating two sources of truth. Decision: make HOSPEDA_DATABASE_URL the SINGLE source, remove TEST_DB_* fallback path from test-database.ts (no backcompat — per user OK 2026-05-18).

tasks.title: Push Drizzle schema to hospeda_test database
tasks.notes: pnpm --filter @repo/db db:push with TEST_DB_URL pointing at hospeda_test. Creates all billing tables in the test DB.

tasks.title: Apply postgres-extras (triggers, MVs, JSONB CHECKs) to hospeda_test
tasks.notes: Run packages/db/scripts/apply-postgres-extras.sh against hospeda_test. Required by ADR-017 — Drizzle push alone is incomplete.

tasks.title: Minimal seed: 2 plans (cheap + expensive) with monthly + annual prices
tasks.notes: Seed billing_plans (UUID id) + billing_prices for monthly + annual. Used by every e2e flow. Idempotent — re-runnable.

tasks.title: Build apps/api/test/e2e/helpers/mp-stub.ts (createMercadoPagoAdapter stub)
tasks.notes: Stub factory returning canned responses for ALL MP adapter operations: preferences.create/get, subscriptions.create/update/cancel, payments.get/refund/list, customers.create/get/update, preapproval.create/update/cancel/list. Configurable per-test via setMpStubResponse(operation, response | error). Supports success, 4xx, 5xx, timeout, and malformed-response modes. Used by T-143-59 to exercise error branches.

tasks.title: Build apps/api/test/e2e/helpers/billing-fixtures.ts
tasks.notes: Reusable fixture data: sample MP webhook payloads (idempotent, signed), preference responses, payment objects, customer records. Mirrors the shape of real MP responses captured from sandbox.

tasks.title: Build apps/api/test/e2e/helpers/billing-factories.ts (DB factories)
tasks.notes: createTestUser, createTestCustomer, createTestSubscription, createTestAddon — generate clean DB rows with predictable IDs. Reset helper for between-test cleanup.

tasks.title: Smoke e2e test: GET /billing/plans returns seeded plans
tasks.notes: Single-test sanity check that infra works end-to-end before writing real flows. If this fails, fix infra before proceeding. Lives at apps/api/test/e2e/flows/billing/smoke-plans.test.ts (new, not the deprecated subscription-purchase.test.ts).

Header + how-to-use + prerequisites + test-user assignment buckets (clean-state vs persisted) + reset recipe via hops psql + 14 Phase 1 sections (annual/monthly/free-plan/upgrade/downgrade/cron/addon/webhook idempotency-signature-failed-payment-concurrency/api-idempotency/sub-activation/entitlement-load) with run-log grid template per section. tasks.title: Author docs/prod-smoke-checklist.md + rollback procedure
tasks.notes: .claude/specs/SPEC-143-billing-testing-coverage/docs/prod-smoke-checklist.md created (401L) per spec.md deliverables-structure path. When-to-run matrix (routine/billing-PR/quarterly/major-release/go-live/incident) + prerequisites (rollback authority, MP prod creds with APP_USR-prefix-but-from-prod-section gotcha, small charge budget, real test-user identity, comms channel, Sentry+Coolify open) + GO/no-go gating criteria (staging green, CI green, no high-sev Sentry, rollback authority). Three flow sections (annual / monthly / addon), each with steps + expected outcome + per-flow rollback procedure + run-log grid. Rollback procedures explicitly reference and route around the open production bugs: bug/refund-flow-gaps (manual MP-dashboard refund required because hospeda's refund handler does not call the MP API), bug/admin-billing-endpoints-broken (admin endpoints with crashes — restart fallback documented), bug/addon-limit-recalc-removebysource-global (cross-customer scope warning on addon cancel), bug/back-url-orphan-billing-return (return-page 404 still expected until fix), cancel-spelling-drift (audit row UK vs live column US). General rollback toolkit section: force-clear stuck sub via SQL, force-clear entitlement cache (admin endpoint + restart fallback), refund via MP dashboard directly, disable broken cron mid-run, page on-call escalation. Sign-off block requires total-refunds=total-charges before a session is marked COMPLETE. Cross-refs to spec, state.json, staging smoke, mp-test-cards-reference (T-143-54 Phase 4 pending), billing-runbooks (T-143-49 Phase 4 pending), and 5 bug engram entries.

tasks.title: Execute Phase 1 prod smokes (annual + monthly + addon, small charges)
tasks.notes: User executes prod checklist with real production credentials and small charges. This is the GO-LIVE GATE for real-money charging.

Each sub-section has steps, expected outcome, and a run-log grid template. Phase 3 placeholder included for T-143-45.

Exhaustive cases: valid code applies discount, expired code rejected, max-uses overflow rejected, percent-off vs fixed-off, code applied then payment canceled (code use-count not consumed), code applied then payment failed (use-count not consumed), code stacking attempt rejected, code applied to ineligible plan rejected, code case-insensitive match, code with min-purchase threshold.

tasks.title: E2E: sponsorship grant / revoke
tasks.notes: OBSOLETE — task notes describe a gift-subscription system (sponsor user grants entitlements to other users with cron expiry + precedence over paid subs) that does NOT exist in the hospeda codebase. The `sponsorships` table + service is CRUD for sponsored ads/posts (a sponsor user pays to feature their own post/event/destination). There is no grant/revoke flow, no sponsorship cron, no entitlement integration. CRUD coverage already lives in unit tests (sponsorship.service.test.ts, sponsorship.model.test.ts). Closed without tests; gap documented in engram `bug/sponsorship-task-notes-misalignment`.
tasks.obsoletedReason: Task notes describe a feature that does not exist in the codebase; CRUD already unit-tested.

tasks.title: E2E: customer override apply / expire
tasks.notes: OBSOLETE — task notes describe a customer-override system (admin sets override → applies on read, override expiry boundary → reverts to plan default, override stacks with sponsorship with precedence rules, override removed mid-cycle) that does NOT exist in the codebase. Verified zero references to customerOverride / customer_override / entitlementOverride / limitOverride in packages/billing, packages/db/src/billing, packages/schemas/src/api/billing, apps/api/src/middlewares/billing.ts, and across qzpay upstream (packages/core/src, packages/drizzle/src, packages/hono/src, drizzle/migrations/*.sql). Only matches are unrelated comments about env-var override and pagination MAX_LIMIT/MAX_OFFSET defaults, plus test-fixture partial overrides. The feature was scoped in spec (Goal + Phase 3 file listing) but never built. Closed without tests; gap documented in engram `bug/customer-override-task-misalignment`. Same precedent as T-143-39 (gift-subscription not implemented).
tasks.obsoletedReason: Task notes describe a feature that does not exist in the codebase or upstream qzpay; no override entity/service/route/table to test against.

tasks.title: E2E: entitlement cache hit/miss/invalidation/TTL
tasks.notes: [reconciled 2026-05-20] Shipped via commits d64af76cf..0e6cd1650 (2026-05-19). Reconciliation pass mark — original task description preserved below. entitlement-cache.test.ts. Exhaustive cases: cache miss → DB hit → primed, cache hit on second read, TTL boundary expiry, manual invalidation on subscription change/cancel/pause/upgrade/downgrade, invalidation on override add/remove, invalidation on sponsorship grant/revoke, cache stampede protection (concurrent reads on miss), Redis down → degrade to DB (no error).

tasks.title: E2E: admin billing ops (list / customer detail / subscription manual ops / addon manual ops)
tasks.notes: [reconciled 2026-05-20] Shipped via commits 6c30ee585..6c30ee585 (2026-05-19). Reconciliation pass mark — original task description preserved below. admin-billing-ops.test.ts. Every /api/v1/admin/billing/* endpoint validated: list endpoints (plans, customers, subscriptions, addons, promo-codes, sponsorships, overrides, exchange-rates, cron-jobs) with pagination + filters + sort; customer detail; manual subscription ops (activate/cancel/pause/resume/refund); manual addon ops (grant/revoke); manual cron trigger; permission enforcement (PermissionEnum, not roles); admin actor required.

tasks.title: E2E: exchange rate cron
tasks.notes: apps/api/test/e2e/flows/billing/exchange-rate-cron.test.ts (3 tests). Stubs DolarAPI + ExchangeRate-API HTTP clients at the @repo/service-core boundary (importOriginal preserves the real ExchangeRateFetcher), leaves ExchangeRateModel + DB real. Tests cover: (1) happy path — fetcher persists USD/ARS and BRL/ARS rates to exchange_rates table, follow-up SELECT returns the fresh rows (the 'next checkout uses fresh rate' contract is exercised as a direct DB read since hospeda has no e2e-reachable checkout → live rate lookup path), (2) HTTP failure — both APIs fail, fetcher reports errors, no DB writes, (3) dry-run — handler runs in dryRun mode, reports planned counts, no DB writes. Naming alignment: task notes say billing_exchange_rates (does not exist); actual table is exchange_rates. Complements unit suite at apps/api/test/cron/exchange-rate-fetch.test.ts which mocks @repo/service-core fully.

tasks.title: E2E: secondary auth/redirect/cancel flows (D1..D8)
tasks.notes: Split across two files because the eight sub-flows mix API and frontend surfaces. apps/api/test/e2e/flows/billing/auth-redirect-cancel-flows.test.ts (4 tests) covers D4 cancel-from-MP webhook, D6 double-submit start-paid (PIN, no idempotency), D7 session-expired during checkout, D8 anonymous checkout attempt. apps/web/test/pages/checkout-pages.test.ts (26 tests, source-reading per apps/web/CLAUDE.md sealed pattern) covers D1 success.astro, D2 failure.astro, D3 pending.astro, index.astro redirect, plus a pin that /billing/return.astro (the orphan back_url) does not exist. D5 browser-back is out-of-scope vitest e2e — Workstream B manual staging smoke (docs/staging-smoke-checklist.md). Discovered bug pinned in engram bug/back-url-orphan-billing-return: MP back_url points at /billing/return which is 404 in apps/web; back_urls.pending=success in qzpay MP adapter; back_url lacks locale prefix. Commits 0b98b006a + b3e68bff4.

Nine sub-sections: 3.1 promo code (validate/apply/expire with route-shadow gap pin), 3.2 sponsorship OBSOLETE block linking T-143-39 + engram bug/sponsorship-task-notes-misalignment, 3.3 customer override OBSOLETE block linking T-143-40 + engram bug/customer-override-task-misalignment, 3.4 entitlement cache (miss→hit, TTL, invalidation, stampede + Redis gaps), 3.5 admin billing ops with the three known endpoint bugs explicitly listed (engram bug/admin-billing-endpoints-broken), 3.6 exchange rate cron with manual-override priority sub-test and a hops psql snippet for direct DB inspection, 3.7 plan migration matrix, 3.8 multi-currency, 3.9 D1..D8 secondary flows with full sub-section detail for D5 browser-back (D5 has NO CI coverage — this section is its only regression check). File now 850L total (Phase 1: 14 sections, Phase 2: 10 sub-sections, Phase 3: 9 sub-sections, sign-off block + cross-refs).

tasks.title: Author docs/mp-test-cards-reference.md
tasks.notes: .claude/specs/SPEC-143-billing-testing-coverage/docs/mp-test-cards-reference.md created (210L). Sourced from live MP developer docs via the MP MCP server (`tarjetas de prueba` topic, MLA / Spanish). Focuses on Argentina because Hospeda is AR-only. Contents: how-to-use (card number + cardholder name combo drives outcome), cards table for MLA (5 cards: Mastercard/Visa/Amex credit + Mastercard/Visa debit, all expiry 11/30, all CVV 123 except Amex 1234), full payment-status outcome table (17 cardholder codes APRO/OTHE/CONT/CALL/FUND/SECU/EXPI/FORM/CARD/INST/DUPL/LOCK/CTNA/ATTE/BLAC/UNSU/TEST), explicit mapping table from each staging-smoke sub-flow to its recommended card+code pair (covers sub-flows 1.1/1.2/1.4/1.7/1.10, 2.9 four rejection variants, 3.9.b/3.9.c), dispute/chargeback testing notes (manual via MP dashboard, no auto-trigger), trial-period note (no test-card variant needed), refund testing note linking bug/refund-flow-gaps, card rotation policy (MP rotates 2x/year, verify before major releases). Last-validated table at the end tracks when the cards were verified against live MP docs. Cross-refs to staging smoke, prod smoke, billing-runbooks (pending), and bug engram entries.

tasks.title: Author docs/e2e-infrastructure-design.md + docs/mp-stub-architecture.md
tasks.notes: Two design docs shipped at .claude/specs/SPEC-143-billing-testing-coverage/docs/. e2e-infrastructure-design.md (451L): 14 sections covering the unit-vs-e2e boundary (the DB), directory layout, vitest configs (e2e + sandbox), env loading (.env.test, SPEC-035 no-fallback), TestDatabaseManager strategies (withRollback / clean / cleanupAllTestData) plus the deprecated beginTransaction pair preserved for legacy tests, seeds (seedBillingTestPlans idempotency + ARS-only baseline), RO-RO factories with naming gotchas (segment vs category, plan_id varchar vs UUID, createTestBillingCustomer returns customerId not id), fixtures barrel (webhook-events + mp-responses + signature-helpers), E2EApiClient with the createMockAdminActor missing ACCESS_API_ADMIN gotcha, seven sealed test patterns (vi.hoisted+vi.mock dance, importOriginal partial mocks, cron handler direct invocation, multi-describe nesting, Date.now spy for TTL boundaries, validator .partial requirement, splitAstroSrc helper), Workstream A vs B distinction, run commands, and the file-placement decision table. mp-stub-architecture.md (342L): 12 sections covering why a stub (CI without creds, deterministic, model-vs-MP framing), the contract (6 sub-adapters mirroring QZPayPaymentAdapter, MpStubOperation union, sync webhooks), four response modes (success/error/timeout/malformed) plus unconfigured-throw fail-loud behavior, dispatcher internals (async + sync split, record-before-timeout, .unref timer), call recording (MpStubCall shape, getCalls(op?) inspection), reset semantics, the full wiring pattern with five load-bearing steps (vi.hoisted ref / vi.mock with importOriginal / factory returning adapter / stubRef.current population / per-test reset), distinction from qzpay-test-control (comparative table), provider-shape gotchas (status spelling US/UK drift, customers.create returns string not object, payments.create/refund arg order), limits the stub does NOT model (no state, no event fan-out, no retries, no signature verification, no rate limits), and how to add a new operation. Commit `b446c8831`.

tasks.title: Add CLAUDE.md rule: billing-touching PR must execute manual smoke checklist
tasks.notes: Rule added to root CLAUDE.md as a new '### Billing testing — manual smoke checklist required (SPEC-143)' sub-section, slotted between Testing Standards and Git Conventions so it surfaces in the same scan as other test-related rules. Five-step workflow documented: identify relevant smoke sections, run them against staging with MP sandbox creds, file sign-off in the checklist, reference the sign-off in the PR description, and additionally run prod smoke for billing-CORE changes (start-paid / webhooks / crons / refund / admin ops). Routine billing-touching PRs (UI tweaks, copy, schema additions) only need staging. Failed smokes block merge; notes-only passes (known documented bug) can merge with the engram entry linked from the PR. References the three smoke artifacts shipped earlier in this same session (T-143-20, T-143-36, T-143-45, T-143-22, T-143-52). Decision provenance: engram #532 Q1. Dependency was T-143-23 (execute Phase 1 prod smokes) which is still pending and requires real prod credentials; the dependsOn relationship reflected the sequencing intent (rule should ideally land AFTER the gate has been smoked once) but the rule's content is self-contained and standing it up now does not block T-143-23 execution.

tasks.title: Coverage verification: 100% line + functional coverage with documented exceptions
tasks.notes: Two-part verification. (1) Run vitest --coverage scoped to apps/api/src/services/*billing*, apps/api/src/routes/billing/*, apps/api/src/routes/webhooks/mercadopago/*, packages/billing/src/**. Target 100%. Each unreached line gets either an additional test or a /* istanbul ignore */ with a one-line justification (must match a true-impossible category: real MP card internals, real fraud detection ML, non-deterministic network races). (2) Functional audit: cross-check docs/billing-runbooks.md against the e2e test inventory — every documented flow + cron + webhook + admin op must have ≥ 1 test reference. Deliverable: docs/coverage-audit-2026.md with the exception list.

tasks.title: CI tuning for billing e2e (parallelism, time budget, isolation)
tasks.notes: [reconciled 2026-05-20] Shipped via commit 78c92e4c5 (2026-05-20). vitest.config.e2e.ts gets JSDoc-documented isolation contract (singleFork mandatory until 48 files migrate off testDb.clean()) + slowTestThreshold + env-gated JSON reporter. apps/api/scripts/check-e2e-budget.mjs parses JSON output, asserts suite/per-file wallclock budgets, prints top-N slowest. New pnpm test:e2e:ci wraps both with exit-code passthrough. apps/api/test/e2e/README.md gets new Isolation Contract + CI Wiring sections (canonical reference notice points to T-143-53 e2e-infrastructure-design.md). CI workflow YAML snippet included in README for manual application (hook blocks agent edits to .github/workflows/). Path to parallelism documented as future SPEC follow-up (schema-per-fork or 26-file clean()-to-withRollback refactor). Original task description: Configure vitest project for billing e2e. Test isolation (DB transaction rollback per test or schema-per-test). Time budget for the suite. Surface in CI report.

tasks.title: Delete deprecated billing e2e tests + E2E-ANALYSIS-REPORT.md (deadweight from 2025-11)
tasks.notes: Files: apps/api/test/e2e/flows/billing/payment-flow.test.ts (28K — soft-skips when billing not configured), subscription-purchase.test.ts (16K — only GETs /billing/plans), sponsorship-purchase.test.ts (16K), apps/api/test/e2e/E2E-ANALYSIS-REPORT.md (13K — refers to /api/v1/subscriptions and /api/v1/payments routes that no longer exist post three-tier refactor). User OK 2026-05-18: delete and rewrite from scratch aligned to new state.json flows. Sandbox tests (apps/api/test/e2e/sandbox/*) are KEPT — they target real MP sandbox and serve Workstream B.

tasks.title: E2E: free plan signup + entitlements (no payment flow)
tasks.notes: [reconciled 2026-05-20] Shipped via commit 228c2534b (2026-05-20). Reconciliation pass mark — original task description preserved below. free-plan-signup.test.ts. New user with no checkout → free-tier entitlements active immediately + no billing_customer row required initially + upgrade-to-paid path from free works. Edge: free-tier rate limits enforced.

tasks.title: E2E: MercadoPago API error handling (stubbed 4xx / 5xx / timeout / malformed)
tasks.notes: mp-error-handling.test.ts. Use mp-stub.ts error modes (T-143-05) to exercise every error branch in packages/billing/src + apps/api/src/services/*billing*: MP returns 400 (validation), 401 (auth), 403 (forbidden), 404 (not found), 422 (business rule), 429 (rate limit), 500 (server), 502/503/504 (gateway), network timeout, malformed JSON. Per response: assert no partial DB write, user gets actionable error, Sentry captures correct context, retry policy (if any) is followed.

tasks.title: E2E: idempotency keys at protected billing API level
tasks.notes: [reconciled 2026-05-20] Shipped via commit b946433fa + carry-over `3023a7424` (2026-05-20). PRODUCTION FIX. New middleware apps/api/src/middlewares/idempotency-key.ts (~330L) enforces X-Idempotency-Key on POST start-paid + addons/:slug/purchase + addons/:id/cancel. Storage: reuses qzpay-drizzle billing_idempotency_keys table (no new schema needed); per-user namespace via hospeda-billing:{userId}:{clientKey}. 4 paths: missing→400, replay→cached response, conflict→409, fresh→cache 2xx on way out. TTL 24h matches MP. Non-2xx not cached. E2EApiClient.post auto-injects fresh UUID with opt-out via opts.idempotencyKey. New test api-idempotency.test.ts (5 tests). Carry-over commit 3023a7424 updated 5 existing tests for T-143-58 tourist-free fallback (monthly/annual/cancel/pause-resume/trial-lifecycle). No web/admin client updates needed — neither calls these 3 endpoints today. Verified 46/46 across 7 e2e files. Original task description: api-idempotency.test.ts. Distinct from webhook idempotency (T-143-15). Tests X-Idempotency-Key header on POST /protected/billing/checkout, /protected/billing/addons/purchase, etc: same key + same body → identical response, no duplicate DB row; same key + different body → conflict 409; missing key → accepted but warned in response.

tasks.title: E2E: plan migration matrix (free↔paid, cycle changes, tier moves)
tasks.notes: plan-migration-matrix.test.ts. Matrix beyond simple upgrade/downgrade: free → paid (no proration), paid → free (cancel-to-free), monthly → annual same tier (proration + cycle realign), annual → monthly same tier (queued to renewal), tier-up monthly → tier-up annual (combined upgrade + cycle change), paid plan with addon → paid plan without addon (addon transfer or revoke).

tasks.title: E2E: multi-currency price selection (ARS / USD / BRL per customer)
tasks.notes: multi-currency.test.ts. Customer with ARS locale → plan ARS price selected; USD locale → USD price; BRL locale → BRL price. Edge: plan with only USD price + customer ARS → fallback to USD with FX conversion using latest billing_exchange_rates row. Stale exchange rate (cron didn't run today) → warning + use last known rate. Currency mismatch between subscription and addon → error.

tasks.title: E2E: past_due grace period enforcement (window + expiry + exempt paths)
tasks.notes: [reframed 2026-05-20] Original scope had two parts: (a) cron-lag grace for renewal-cron-not-fired-yet, (b) admin disables a plan while customer subscriptions are active. Both are orthogonal to the shipped past_due grace mechanism (apps/api/src/middlewares/past-due-grace.middleware.ts) and are deferred to SPEC-148 (Billing defensive grace + plan lifecycle). This task now covers the past_due grace as actually implemented. New scope: past-due-grace.test.ts. Cover (1) past_due sub within grace window allows request and emits X-Grace-Period-Days-Remaining header, (2) past_due sub outside grace window returns 402 GRACE_PERIOD_EXPIRED with daysOverdue, (3) exempt paths (/trial/reactivate, /checkout, /subscriptions/reactivate, /payment-methods) bypass enforcement even when grace is exceeded, (4) non-past_due subs pass through cleanly without header. See [[spec/spec-148/scope-deferred-from-spec-143]] and SPEC-148 spec.md for the deferred work.

tasks.title: E2E: webhook concurrency (duplicate concurrent + out-of-order delivery)
tasks.notes: webhook-concurrency.test.ts. (a) Same event ID delivered twice concurrently (parallel POSTs) → only one DB mutation, both return 200, no race-induced duplicate row (rely on DB unique constraint on event_id). (b) Out-of-order delivery: payment.approved arrives BEFORE preference.created/preapproval.authorized in the same flow → reconciliation logic catches up correctly without ending in inconsistent state.

tasks.title: Infra: fix cross-file test isolation in e2e suite (parallel runs drop pool + add schema preflight)
tasks.notes: [reconciled 2026-05-20] Shipped via commit c1efb8b2e (2026-05-20). Reconciliation pass mark — original task description preserved below. Reproduced 2026-05-19 during T-143-11 sub-commit 1: running `pnpm test:e2e <fileA> <fileB>` with two or more e2e billing files together fails every test in both files with `Failed query: select id from billing_plans where name = $1` even though each file passes in isolation. Root cause hypothesis: each test file's `beforeAll → testDb.setup()` calls `initializeDb(pool)` which mutates a process-global singleton; when vitest reuses the Node worker (singleFork: true) across files, the second file's setup wins and the first file's afterAll teardown closes a pool that has been replaced — subsequent queries in the leftover hooks hit the closed pool. Additionally, the test DB schema can be silently dropped by external commands (other worktrees, `pnpm db:fresh-dev` against the wrong DSN) and there is no startup guard that verifies the schema exists before tests run. Two-part fix: (1) make `testDb.setup()` idempotent and detect/skip when the global pool already points at the same DSN, OR scope the pool per-file via a vitest globalSetup. (2) Add a schema-existence preflight in `setup/test-database.ts` that throws a clear `pnpm db:push --target=test` instruction if billing_plans/etc are missing, instead of failing the first query mid-test. Until this lands, the canonical commands stay: run one file at a time with `pnpm test:e2e <file>` and rebuild schema via `HOSPEDA_DATABASE_URL=...hospeda_test pnpm db:push && packages/db/scripts/apply-postgres-extras.sh <dsn>` after any external DB reset.
